description: Image pill that fans out into concentric echo rings on hover, then collapses back to a single filled image.
keyFeatures: Rests as one clean image; on hover echoed copies fan into faded concentric rings.
Configurable layer count, pill radius, front scale, and scale step.
Overlay tint, fade strength, duration, stagger, and easing curves.
Invert behaviour with Effect On: hover vs rest.
Static preview pins the expanded trail for marketplace thumbnails.
descriptionParagraphs: Repeat Image Hover stacks multiple copies of the same image and animates them into a pill-shaped echo trail.
Tune geometry, tint, and motion from the controls panel — or flip Effect On to show the trail at rest.
